utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I know I miss you too . I can not wait to see you . I love you . Bye .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I can not wait to see you .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , what is in here ? Rocks ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I am really gonna miss this apartment . You know , Ben ... Ben took his first steps right over there .
